name: Microsis: Survival
description:
In the year 20XX, the world was forever changed by the outbreak of the Microsis Virus - a mysterious disease that shrank a small but growing percentage of humanity to miniature sizes overnight.

No cure exists. No vaccine is available. But desperate rumors spread fast: "If you consume a tiny human, you gain immunity."

Scientific authorities deny it. Governments plead for calm. But fear, chaos, and desperation rule the streets.

As one of the afflicted - no larger than 3 centimeters tall - you must survive a world gone mad.

Pets see you as prey. Humans see you as snacks, novelties, or vermin.

Every footstep could be your last.

Will you find mercy? Shelter? Salvation?

Or will you vanish - trampled, eaten, or forgotten - like so many others?

Welcome to Microsis: Survival.
creator: GigaChadChad
